notes: Passive - reads the page's __NEXT_DATA__ JSON plus regex matches on the page HTML for dateCreated/dateModified, then shows a draggable modal titled 'Snapchat Profile Information' with attribution 'Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training'. Fails with alert('Sorry. This Snapchat user has no public profile.') if pageType !== 18 (i.e. not a public profile page).

checks.comment: At least one strong element with profile data
